abstract: Comprehensive guide for integrating Velt's server-side surface: the Velt REST API v2, JWT-based authentication for the frontend SDK, and webhook event handling. Covers the required `x-velt-api-key` and `x-velt-auth-token` header contract, JWT token generation and refresh flows (48h expiry), full CRUD over comment annotations, comments, notifications, users (including GDPR data export/delete), documents, organizations, folders, activity logs and CRDT documents via REST. Also covers v1 webhook setup plus v2 / Svix enterprise webhooks with retries and transformations, payload shapes for comment, huddle and CRDT events, and signature verification. All guidance is evidence-backed from official Velt documentation. For the self-hosted Python SDK (`velt-py`) used to store data on your own infrastructure, see `velt-self-hosting-data-best-practices`.
